classes.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.top
documentation: Return the n terms most similar to input query.

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.rank
documentation: Return all terms, ranked by query similarity.

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.score
documentation: Return all terms with a similarity score to the query.

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.from_files
documentation:
Create a TermMatcher from a list of paths to source ontologies.
Both filepaths and URLs are supported.

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.load
documentation: Deserialize a TermMatcher object from disk.

methods.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.matcher.TermMatcher.dump
documentation: Serialize to disk.
Fuzzy matches terms from RDF terminologies to input queries.

modules.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.cache
documentation:
Caching utilities for pyfuzon.

This module provides functions to help manage the cache of TermMatchers.
Cache keys are built by fuzon using the sorted source paths. For each path,
a stamp is computed as follows (missing values are replaced by empty strings):
    + file path: {path}-{size}-{last-modified-datetime}
    + url: {url}-{etag-checksum}-{last-modified-datetime}
All stamps are then concatenated and hash of the result is used as the cache key.

Cache paths adhere to the following specifications:
    + Linux: XDG base / user directory
    + Windows: Known folder API
    + MacOS: Standard Directories guidelines
For more information, see: https://github.com/dirs-dev/dirs-rs

functions.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.cache.get_cache_key
documentation: Return a deterministic cache key based on a collection of source paths.

functions.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.cache.get_cache_path
documentation: Return a full platform-specific cache path based on a collection of source paths.

functions.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.cache.cache_by_source
documentation: Save each source into an independent TermMatcher cache file.

functions.name: pyfuzon.python.pyfuzon.cache.load_by_source
documentation: Load and combine single-source cache entries into a combined TermMatcher.
